case_title: ROSHAN PATEL et al VS. PETER PAPPAS

docket_entries.description: SC-105A RETURNED WITHOUT ACTION. ON CALENDAR FOR MOVAC AND DISMISSAL.
REQUEST FOR DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, ROSHAN
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $833.00 FILED BY PATEL, ROSHAN FORIERO-PATEL, MARY AS TO DEFENDANT PAPPAS, PETER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-30-2009 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER "GRANTED" ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS (MOTION TO VACATE) HEARING FILED BY THE DEFENDANT.

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PETER PAPPAS IS GRANTED. PURSUANT TO MEDIATION SETTLEMENT, MOTION TO VACATE IS GRANTED; PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PATEL, ROSHAN FORIERO-PATEL, MARY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PAPPAS, PETER $833.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $833.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING (MOTION TO VACATE) FILED BY DEFENDANT PAPPAS, PETER
SC-105 REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER FILED BY DEFENDANT.
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT PAPPAS, PETER HEARING SET FOR FEB-19-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-17-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PAPPAS, PETER

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-30-2009 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PLAINTIFFS. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT'S ATTORNEY MARIANNE F. SKIPPER, WHO APPEARS TODAY TO REQUEST A CONTINUANCE ON DEFENDANT'S BEHALF. REQUEST IS DENIED. JUDGE: ANDREW CHENG. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PETER PAPPAS SET FOR FEB-19-2010 IS CONTINUED TO MAR-26-2010 AT 1:30 PM IN 506. *DEFENDANT MAY APPLY TO TRANSFER THIS CASE TO BE HEARD WITH THE RELATED SUPERIOR COURT ACTION, PURSUANT TO CCP 116.390.*

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PETER PAPPAS SET FOR MAR-26-2010 IS CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAY-03-2010 AT 1:30 PM IN 506. IF EITHER PARTY INTENDS TO APPEAR, THAT PARTY SHALL NOTIFY THE PARTY 3 COURT DAYS IN ADVANCE. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
